hasselback-butternut-squash-with-bay-lea.name: Hasselback Butternut Squash With Bay Leaves

ingredients.item: Butternut squash or 2–3 small honeynut squash

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 425°. Halve squash lengthwise and scoop out seeds with a large spoon. Using a peeler, remove skin and white flesh below (you should reach the deep orange flesh). Rub all over with oil; season with salt and pepper. Roast in a baking dish just large enough to hold halves side by side until beginning to soften (a paring knife should easily slip in only about ¼"), 15–18 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring chile, maple syrup, butter, and vinegar to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium-high, stirring occasionally and removing chile as soon as desired heat level is reached (set aside for serving), until just thick enough to coat spoon, 6–8 minutes. Reduce heat to very low and keep glaze warm.

Transfer squash to a cutting board and let cool slightly. Using a sharp knife, score rounded sides of squash halves crosswise, going as deep as possible but without cutting all the way through. Return squash to baking dish, scored sides up, and tuck bay leaves between a few of the slices; season with salt and pepper.

Roast squash, basting with glaze every 10 minutes or so and using pastry brush to lift off any glaze in dish that is browning too much, until tender and glaze forms a rich brown coating, 45–60 minutes. Serve topped with reserved chiles.
Do Ahead: Squash can be roasted 4 hours ahead. Let cool until just warm; cover and store at room temperature. Reheat before serving.

have-mercy-triple-chocolate-cake.name: have Mercy!' Triple Chocolate Cake
instructions: Allow butter and eggs to stand at room temperature for 30 minutes. Meanwhile, lightly grease bottoms of three 8-inch round baking pans or two 8x8x2-inch square or 9x1-1/2-inch round cake pans. Line bottom of pans with parchment paper. Grease and lightly flour parchment paper and sides of pans. Or grease one 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Set pan(s) aside.
Preheat oven to 177°C. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder and salt; set aside.

In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds. Gradually add granulated sugar, about 1/4 cup at a time, beating on medium speed until well combined (3 to 4 minutes). Scrape sides of bowl; continue beating on medium speed for 2 minutes. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition (about 1 minute total). Beat in vanilla.

Alternately add flour mixture and milk to beaten mixture, beating on low speed just until combined after each addition. Beat on medium to high speed for 20 seconds more. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan(s).

Bake for 35 to 40 minutes for 8-inch square pans and the 13x9x2-inch pan, 30 to 35 minutes for 8- or 9-inch round pans, or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool cake layers in pans for 10 minutes. Remove from pans. Peel off parchment paper. Cool thoroughly on wire racks. Or place 13x9x2-inch cake in pan on a wire rack; cool thoroughly. Frost with desired frosting.

To prepare frosting, in a large saucepan, melt semisweet chocolate chips and butter over low heat, stirring frequently. Cool for 5 minutes. Stir in sour cream. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating with an electric mixer until smooth. This frosts tops and sides of two or three 8- or 9-inch cake layers. (Halve the recipe to frost the top of a 13x9x2-inch cake.) Cover and store frosted cake in the refrigerator.

healthy-fried-rice.name: Healthy Fried Rice
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a skillet, and cook garlic until softened.
Add the chicken, salt, and pepper, and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and broccoli, and sauté until tender.
Add the rice, soy sauce, and peas, and mix thoroughly.
Enjoy!

herbed-faux-tisserie-chicken-and-potatoe.name: Herbed Faux-tisserie Chicken And Potatoes

ingredients.item: Finely chopped fresh marjoram; plus 4 sprigs
Finely chopped fresh thyme; plus 4 sprigs

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Coarsely grind fennel seeds and red pepper flakes in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle. Combine spice mixture, chopped marjoram, chopped thyme, 1 Tbsp. salt, ½ tsp. pepper, and 3 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl. Rub chicken inside and out with spice mixture. Stuff chicken with lemon, garlic, 2 marjoram sprigs, and 2 thyme sprigs. Tie legs together with kitchen twine.

Toss potatoes with remaining 3 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Push potatoes to edges of baking sheet and scatter remaining 2 marjoram and 2 thyme sprigs in center; place chicken on herbs. Roast, turning potatoes and basting chicken every hour, until skin is browned, meat is extremely tender, and potatoes are golden brown and very soft, about 3 hours. Let chicken rest at least 10 minutes before carving.

herbed-flatbread-focaccia-4-ways.name: Herbed Flatbread (focaccia) 4 Ways
instructions: Stir yeast packet into water and allow yeast to bloom. (A light foam should appear on top of the water after about 5 minutes. This means the yeast is alive and active.)
Add olive oil to water and mix.
In a large bowl, mix flour, salt, pepper, and herbs together.
Once incorporated, create a small well in the middle and pour in the water/yeast/oil mixture.

Mix by hand, wetting your working hand before mixing so the dough doesn’t stick to your fingers. The water and flour should come together and form a rough dough that pulls away from the sides of the bowl.
NOTE: If the dough is too sticky, add more flour in small increments, about 1 tablespoon at a time. If the dough is too dry, add more water, 1 tablespoon at a time.
Once the dough begins to come together, turn it out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead the dough until it forms a smooth ball.
Coat the bowl the dough was initially mixed in with about a tablespoon of olive oil and place the dough ball inside. Give it a few turns to coat the dough in the oil.
Cover and let the dough rise until it doubles in size about 1 hour.
While the dough rises, prepare a large baking sheet by generously coating it with olive oil.
Once the dough has risen, turn it out onto the prepared baking sheet and flatten it out into a large rectangle.
Using a knife or dough scraper, cut the dough into 4 evenly sized rectangles.
Press the rectangles flat and arrange them with each one pressed into a corner of the baking sheet.
Cover and let the dough rest for 20 to 30 minutes. Preheat the oven to 450˚F (230˚C) while the dough is resting.
Depending on the temperature of your kitchen and activeness of the yeast, the 4 rectangles should have risen to be about an 1-inch (2 ½ cm) thick.
Using your fingers, poke the the dough all over--creating small dimples across the surface.

Generously coat the tops of the dough rectangles one last time with olive oil (some oil will pool inside of the divots we made with our fingers. That’s ok!) Use a basting brush to ensure all of the dough gets covered with olive oil.

Top the dough rectangles with your choice of toppings. (We did four different combinations, including tomatoes with fresh rosemary, caramelized onions and parmesan cheese, mixed olive with gorgonzola cheese, and 3-cheese using parmesan, mozzarella, and gorgonzola.)
Once finished with the toppings, liberally sprinkle the breads with a coarse salt.
Bake at 450˚F (230˚C) for 20-25 minutes until golden brown.
Allow the bread to cool for 10 minutes before cutting into equal pieces.
Enjoy!

high-fiber-pancakes.name: High-fiber Pancakes
instructions: Whisk together milk, eggs, oil, and vanilla together in a medium bowl.

Whisk together baking mix, bran meal, sugar, ground flax seeds, chia seeds, and baking powder together in a large bowl. Make a well in the center; add 1 tablespoon egg mixture into the well and whisk until well combined. Continue adding and whisking in egg mixture, 1 tablespoon at a time, until batter has thickened and takes 1 to 2 seconds to fall off the whisk.
Heat a griddle over medium-high heat; grease with butter.

Working in batches, drop 1/3 cup batter onto the griddle about 4 inches apart; cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip gently and cook until browned on the other side, 2 to 3 minutes. Repeat with remaining batter, greasing the griddle with more butter if needed.

holiday-coffee-liquor.name: Holiday Coffee Liquor
instructions: Stir water, sugar, vodka, coffee, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl or pitcher until sugar is completely dissolved. Cool.

home-style-cezerye-lezzet.name: Home Style Cezerye
instructions: 1. Clean and repel the Carrots.
2. Cook the powder on sugar and half-water glass until the water is added and thoroughly softened in the jealous fire.
3. Mix the flour and starch with half a glass of water in a separate container and add it to carrot mixture.
4. Add walnuts and nuts into the consistency of the Mac.
5. Pour from January and pour a rough in the form of slightly wetened dome.
6. Get inverted in the refrigerator for 2-3 hours.
7. slice the tip with a wetened blade and decorate it with half walnuts and serve.

honey-mustard-roast-chicken.name: Honey Mustard Roast Chicken
instructions: Mix mustard, honey, vinegar, Sriracha, paprika, pepper, and salt in a very large bowl until combined.

Place chicken, breast-side down, on a work surface. Starting at the tailbone, cut along either side of the backbone with scissors or a knife, cutting as close to the bone as possible. Discard the backbone and trim any excess fat or skin from the chicken.

Find the cartilage where the wishbone comes together and forms a 'v' and make 1 shallow cut with a knife through the cartilage. Press down on either side to flatten the chicken and expose the breastbone, making another cut in the cartilage if necessary. Run your fingers along the breastbone until the rest of the cartilage pulls away. Make a few shallow cuts into the legs, thighs, and wings to ensure even cooking.
Transfer chicken into the bowl of marinade and toss until well coated. Marinate, breast-side down, in the refrigerator, 4 to 12 hours.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Transfer chicken, skin-side up, to the prepared baking sheet. Season with salt. Reserve marinade for basting.
Cook in the center of the preheated oven until chicken starts to darken in spots, 35 to 40 minutes.
While the chicken is roasting, transfer excess marinade into a small saucepan. Add chicken stock to thin the sauce a bit and bring to a boil. Remove from the heat.

Baste chicken with sauce and continue to roast, basting again if desired, until no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 15 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Remove chicken from the oven and brush any rendered fat and accumulated juices from the pan onto the chicken.
Transfer chicken to a serving platter and garnish with green onions. Slice and serve, spooning any remaining sauce over top.

honey-vanilla-grilled-sweet-potatoes.name: Honey Vanilla Grilled Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Preheat grill for medium heat.
Arrange sweet potatoes in a 9x13-inch aluminum foil pan. Stir butter and cinnamon together in a bowl and drizzle over potatoes. Cover pan with aluminum foil.

Bake sweet potatoes on the preheated grill, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes. Stir honey and vanilla extract together in a bowl and drizzle over sweet potatoes. Return aluminum foil to cover pan. Continue cooking on the grill until sweet potatoes are tender, about 10 more minutes.

ingredients.prep: flaky sea salt (such as Maldon), and crushed red pepper flakes (for serving; optional)

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 525° or as high as oven will go.

Once dough has risen in baking sheet, top with mozzarella, dot pie with tomato sauce, and top with hot and sweet soppressata, fennel, chiles, then Pecorino; drizzle with oil. Bake until golden brown and crisp on bottom and sides, 20–30 minutes.

hot-chicken-sandwich-lezzet.name: Hot Chicken Sandwich
instructions: 1. Put the chest meat into a medium-sized pot and cook in the middle fire, adding 4 water cups of water.
2. Divide the onion to 4 and add it to the pot.

hot-pimento-cheese-dip.name: Hot Pimento Cheese Dip
instructions: Put the chipotle peppers and adobo sauce in a small food processor or blender and blend until the mixture turns into a smooth purée. Set aside. The chipotle purée can be made in advance, stored in an airtight container, and refrigerated for up to 2 months.

On a cutting board, sprinkle the garlic with a large pinch of salt and gather it into a small mound. Holding the blunt side of the knife with both hands, press and scrape the knife’s sharp end, holding it at a slight angle, across the garlic mound to flatten it. Repeat, dragging it across the garlic, until you have a smooth paste. Set aside.

In a small bowl, mix the cornstarch and 1½ tsp. of the evaporated milk into a slurry. Pour the rest of the evaporated milk into a medium saucepan and stir in the slurry. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, whisking constantly. Turn the heat to low and add the Cheddar gradually by the handful, stirring until the Cheddar is melted and the mixture is smooth. Add the cream cheese and whisk until it melts. Stir in the mayonnaise, pimento peppers, 1½ tsp. of the chipotle purée, and the garlic paste. Season with salt. Transfer to a serving bowl or keep it warm in a slow cooker and serve immediately.
To reheat the sauce, microwave it, stirring every 30 seconds, until fully melted.

how-to-make-a-taco-bell-style-quesarito-.name: How To Make A Taco Bell-style Quesarito Burrito
how-to-make-a-taco-bell-style-quesarito-.original_name: Cómo hacer un burrito quesarito al estilo Taco Bell

Put an omelette of flour into a large frying pan with low heat. Sprinkle the cheddar and Monterey Jack cheese about half the omelette. Cover with another omelette and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese's melted and the omelette's crisp out. Pull back from the fire.

Sobre la quesadilla ya cocida, agrega en el centro una capa de arroz cocido, frijoles negros, la carne molida sazonada, crema agria y salsa chipotle. Trata de mantener los ingredientes alineados para facilitar el enrollado.
Comienza doblando los lados hacia el centro y luego enrolla firmemente desde el borde inferior hacia el superior. Presiona suavemente para compactarlo.
Put the Quesarite into the hot frying pan with the edge down to seal the burrit. Cooking for 1-2 minutes from each side, till the omelette is golden and crispy.

how-to-make-spaghetti-with-clams-spaghet.original_name: Cómo hacer espaguetis con almejas (Spaguetti alle vongole)

ingredients.item: 6 cda aceite de oliva extra virgen
6  dientes de ajo (picados en trozos grandes)
1 taza vino blanco seco ((pinot grigio, chardonnay o sauvignon blanc))

instructions: In a large pot with high heat, boils 3.5 liters of water and 2 tablespoons of kosher salt. Add the espagueti and cook as instructed by the package until you are at dente.
A large frying pan with medium-high heat heats olive oil (hot and hot). Add the jackets and garlic. Jumps till they're golden, about 30 seconds.

Agrega el vino, las hojuelas de pimiento rojo, 3/4 de cucharadita de sal kosher, las almejas (previamente remojadas) y 1/4 de taza de perejil. Lleva a fuego lento, tapa y cocina hasta que las almejas se abran, de 6 a 8 minutos. Desecha las almejas que no abrieron.
Drain the espagueti onto a paddle and reserve 1 / 2 cup of cooking water. Add dough to frying pan with clams.

The fire goes up half and cooks the spaghetti with clams, stirring occasionally, till the dough absorbs most of the salsa and is tender, 1 to 2 minutes. If necessary, add some cooking water to maintain moisture. Take the frying pan from the fire.
Add butter, lemon frying, lemon juice and the remaining 2 tablespoons of parsley and stir to cover.
Test and tighten with more salt, lime grates and / or lemon juice if necessary.
Transfiere a un plato y sirve.

ingredients.item: 800 g of clear cramps (rings and tentacles)
400 g of shredded or pitted tomato

instructions: In a large pot, heat up the oil and sock the chopped ion and garlic till they are soft and slightly golden.
Add clear and crisp squids. It cookies about 5 minutes so that they will release their fluids and start to get golden.
Gather the red wine and put up the fire to evaporate the alcohol (2-3 minutes).
Add shredded tomato, bay, salt and pepper. Mix well and cook over medium heat 10 minutes.
It incorporates the potatoes into cubes, partially cover and let them cook with fire under 25-30 minutes, stirring from time to time. The potatoes should be tender and the salsa thick.
Refix salt and pepper if necessary. Serves hot with fresh parsley minced above.

how-to-make-zucchini-and-feta-risotto-co.name: How To Make Zucchini And Feta Risotto
how-to-make-zucchini-and-feta-risotto-co.original_name: Cómo hacer risotto de calabacín y queso feta
instructions: In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic and put them to a cold till they are translucent.
Add the pumpkin and cook for about 5 minutes till soft.
Incorporates the arboric rice into the frying pan and removes it to impregnate from the oil and slightly cough for 2 minutes.
Fold the white wine and cook, stirring constantly, till the liquid evaporate.
It starts to add hot broth, one cup at a time, stirring often and waiting for the fluid to be absorbed before adding more. That process will last about 18-20 minutes.
It continues till the rice is cooked but still at the dente and the risotto has a creamy texture.
Remove frying pan from the fire and add butter, parmesan cheese and most Feta cheese (have some to decorate). Mix well till cheeses melt and integrate into risotto.
Reaping the date with salt and pepper to taste.
Sirve el risotto caliente, decorado con el queso feta restante y hojas de albahaca fresca.

instructions: On a pounding board, we cut into small cubes, ham, pumpkin and garlic.
In a frying pan with olive oil and as hot we add garlic and ham. Add the pumpkin and tomato and let them cook for 3 minutes while at the same time stirring.
Abre los bollitos en la mitad y retira la parte interna tratando de dejar un hueco en el que luego agregaremos el relleno.
Agrega el relleno y el queso emmental.
Hornea for 5 minutes at 22020.
Enjoy while it's still hot.

ingredients.item: 4  bistecs de res ((150-200 g cada uno))
Sal y pimien ta al gusto
1 cda of butter (optional for frying eggs)

instructions: He opts for tender cuts as his back, sirloin or entrecot. If you use more financial cuts, hit them with a slate to soften them.
Leave the meat with at least 30 minutes with garlic, cumin, oregano, salt, pepper and a touch of lemon or vinegar juice. That doesn't just enhance the taste but softens the flesh.
Use a hot frying pan or grill to seal the steaks. That creates a golden crusts and keeps the juices inside.
Cooking the steaks according to your choice: mean term (3-4 minutes) or cooked (5-6 minutes). Avoid overcooking them so they don't get dry.
Fresh eggs have clear and more tasty yolks, improving plate production and taste.
Cooking eggs with butter or oil over medium heat. If you want the liquid yolk, remove them as soon as the clear's completely cooked.
Sprinkle some paprika, freshly ground or smoked pepper onto the fried egg to give them more taste and color.
Sirve de inmediato y disfruta.
